title: WETNFIX (20 Discs) - Fixing Wall Plugs Fast! No Need to Fill or redrill.
features: Specifically created to solve the commonest DIY problem - securing wall plugs/anchors in weak crumbly masonry or oversized holes or fittings which have come loose with repeated use.
It is ideal for fittings such as curtain rails, shelves, toilet roll holders, towel rails, hooks etc.
Fast, easy to use and sets in 3 minutes
Suitable for most materials, including masonry, wood, ceramics and plasterboard
If you have a wall in your home or office, you need WETNFIX in your tool box.
description: Product Description WETNFIX If you have a wall in your home or office, you need WETNFIX in your tool box. WETNFIX - Specifically created to solve the commonest DIY problem - securing wall plugs in weak crumbly walls or securing loose fittings that have come loose. It is ideal for securing loose fixtures or fittings such as curtain rails, shelves, toilet roll holders, towel rails, hooks etc. Fast, easy to use and sets in 3 minutes. Suitable for most materials, including masonry, wood, ceramics and plasterboard. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Previous page 1. How to fix a loose curtain rail First remove the fixture and loose wall plugs with a screwdriver Next 2. WET Take disc of WETNFIX from the packet and dip into a container of water. Gently shake off any excess water. Next 3. WRAP Place the end of the plug in the center of the disc and mould around all sides. Next 4. Re-insert the plug and WETNFIX . Insert the plug into the hole and gently tap with a hammer to fit flush with the surface. If it is loose add additional discs to ensure a tight fit. Wipe any excess liquid with a damp cloth. Next 5. Ready in minutes In 3-4 minutes, WETNFIX will set and the surface plug will be ready for fixtures. (Add 1 minute to the setting time for each additional disc used). Next 6. FIX Now that the WETNFIX has set hard, simply re-screw the curtain rail back in place. WETNFIX is simple to use and enables you to get your fixtures and fittings back on the wall with minimum fuss. Next Next page Above is an example of how to use WETNFIX on a loose curtain rail. Simply WET, WRAP and FIX! Suggested uses Toilet roll holders WETNFIX can be used to fix loose toilet roll holders that have come loose with repeated use. Shelving and wall fixtures WETNFIX can be used to fix wobbly shelves or wall fixtures. Coat Hooks WETNFIX can be used to re-hang loose coat hooks. Curtain Rails WETNFIX is ideal for repairing curtain rails.
